title: F5 AI Red Team
description: Evaluates agentic AI systems through adversarial testing of prompts, context, and multi-step workflows, simulating attack scenarios to identify unsafe behaviors, assess resilience, and provide structured findings to support risk assessment and mitigation.

items: Agent Penetration Testing, Adversarial red-teaming: goal drift, prompt injection, hallucination chaining, & over-permissioned tool usage.
